# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent kafka topic authorization.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

# server.properties

############################# Server Basics #############################
broker.id=1
listeners=PLAINTEXT://:9092,SSL://:9093
log.dirs=/var/lib/kafka/data
num.network.threads=3
num.io.threads=8
socket.send.buffer.bytes=1048576
socket.receive.buffer.bytes=1048576
socket.request.max.bytes=104857600
connections.max.idle.ms=600000

############################# Log Basics #############################
log.retention.hours=168
log.segment.bytes=1073741824
log.index.size.max.bytes=536870912
log.flush.interval.messages=10000
log.flush.interval.ms=1000
log.roll.jitter.ms=0
log.purge.interval.ms=120000
log.retention.check.interval.ms=300000

############################# Replication Settings #############################
default.replication.factor=3
min.insync.replicas=2
replica.fetch.max.bytes=104857600
replica.fetch.response.max.bytes=104857600
num.replica.fetchers=2
replica.lag.time.max.ms=30000

############################# Zookeeper Connection #############################
zookeeper.connect=localhost:2181,localhost:2182,localhost:2183
zookeeper.connection.timeout.ms=6000

############################# Security Settings #############################
listeners=PLAINTEXT://:9092,SSL://:9093
ssl.keystore.location=/var/lib/kafka/data/server.keystore.jks
ssl.keystore.password=<your_password>
ssl.key.password=<your_password>
ssl.truststore.location=/var/lib/kafka/data/client.truststore.jks
ssl.truststore.password=<your_password>
ssl.endpoint.identification.algorithm=https
sasl.mechanism.inter.broker.protocol=PLAIN
sasl.enabled.mechanisms=PLAIN,SCRAM-SHA-256,SCRAM-SHA-512

############################# Authorization Settings #############################
authorizer.class.name=kafka.security.auth.SimpleAclAuthorizer
super.users=User:admin
user.principal.filter.regex=^CN=(.*?),OU=Kafka,O=Apache$
